objective: String to lowercase manual loop: write a small AGC module.
solution:
(module ManualToLower
  (defun to_lower_manual (s)
    (def len (str_length s))
    (def result "")
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i len)
      (def char (str_substring s i 1))
      (def lower_char (str_lower char))
      (set result (str_concat result lower_char))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    result)

  (test empty_string
    (eq? (to_lower_manual "") ""))

  (test all_uppercase
    (eq? (to_lower_manual "HELLO WORLD") "hello world"))

  (test all_lowercase
    (eq? (to_lower_manual "test test test") "test test test"))

  (test mixed_case
    (eq? (to_lower_manual "AgC PrOgRaMmInG") "agc programming"))

  (test numbers_symbols
    (eq? (to_lower_manual "123!@#ABCdef!@#123") "123!@#abcdef!@#123"))

  (test single_char
    (eq? (to_lower_manual "A") "a")))

(module PalindromeCheck
  (defun is_palindrome (s)
    (def len (str_length s))
    (if (< len 1) (return 1)) ; An empty or single-character string is a palindrome

    (def left_index 0)
    (def right_index (- len 1))

    (while (< left_index right_index)
      (def char_left (str_substring s left_index 1))
      (def char_right (str_substring s right_index 1))
      (if (not (str_eq char_left char_right))
        (return 0))
      (set left_index (+ left_index 1))
      (set right_index (- right_index 1)))
    1)

  (test empty_string
    (eq? (is_palindrome "") 1))

  (test single_char_string
    (eq? (is_palindrome "a") 1))

  (test even_length_palindrome
    (eq? (is_palindrome "abba") 1))

  (test even_length_non_palindrome
    (eq? (is_palindrome "abcb") 0))

  (test odd_length_palindrome
    (eq? (is_palindrome "madam") 1))

  (test odd_length_non_palindrome
    (eq? (is_palindrome "madam1") 0))

  (test numbers_as_string
    (eq? (is_palindrome "12321") 1))
)

(module EnvConcat
  (extern defun env_read (key) @capability "env.get")

  (defun concat_env_vars (key1 key2)
    (def val1 (env_read key1))
    (def val2 (env_read key2))
    (str_concat val1 val2))

  (test both_present
    (mocks (env.get "PREFIX" "Hello") (env.get "SUFFIX" "World"))
    (eq? (concat_env_vars "PREFIX" "SUFFIX") "HelloWorld"))

  (test first_missing
    (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "") (env.get "LAST" "World"))
    (eq? (concat_env_vars "FIRST" "LAST") "World"))

  (test second_missing
    (mocks (env.get "FIRST" "Hello") (env.get "LAST" ""))
    (eq? (concat_env_vars "FIRST" "LAST") "Hello"))

  (test both_missing

    (eq? (concat_env_vars "PART1" "PART2") ""))

    (eq? (concat_env_vars "SPACE_VAR" "SPACE_VAR2") "  test  test  "))

  (test with_numbers
    (mocks (env.get "NUMERIC" "123") (env.get "OTHER_NUM" "456"))

(module DigitalRoot
  (defun calculate_digit_sum (n)
    (def acc 0)
    (def current_n n)
    (while (> current_n 0)
      (set acc (+ acc (math_mod current_n 10)))
      (set current_n (math_floor (/ current_n 10))))
    acc)

  (defun digital_root (n)
    (def current_n n)
    (while (> current_n 9)
      (set current_n (calculate_digit_sum current_n)))
    current_n)

  (test single_digit (eq? (digital_root 7) 7))
  (test two_digits (eq? (digital_root 49) 4))
  (test three_digits (eq? (digital_root 199) 1))
  (test large_number (eq? (digital_root 9999) 9)))

(module DigitalRoot
  (defun sum_digits (n)
    (def acc 0)
    (def cur n)
    (while (> cur 0)
      (set acc (+ acc (math_mod cur 10)))
      (set cur (math_floor (/ cur 10))))
    acc)

  (defun digital_root (n)
    (def acc n)
    (while (>= acc 10)
      (set acc (sum_digits acc)))
    acc)

  (test zero       (eq? (digital_root 0) 0))
  (test single_digit (eq? (digital_root 7) 7))
  (test two_digits    (eq? (digital_root 49) 4))
  (test three_digits   (eq? (digital_root 123) 6))
  (test large_number (eq? (digital_root 987654321) 9)))

objective: Count occurrences of a character in a string: write a small AGC module.
solution:
(module StringCharCount
  (defun count_char_occurrences (s char_to_find)
    (def count 0)
    (def i 0)
    (def len (str_length s))
    (while (< i len)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) char_to_find)
        (set count (+ count 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    count)

  (test empty_string
    (eq? (count_char_occurrences "" "a") 0))

)

objective: Linear search in array: write a small AGC module.
solution:
(module LinearSearch
  (defun linear_search (arr target)
    (def i 0)
    (def n (arr_length arr))
    (while (< i n)
      (def current_element (arr_get arr i))
      (if (= current_element target)
        (return i))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    -1) ; Return -1 if not found

  (defun make_array (a b c d e)
    (def xs (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set xs 0 a)
    (arr_set xs 1 b)
    (arr_set xs 2 c)
    (arr_set xs 3 d)
    (arr_set xs 4 e)
    xs)

  (test empty_array
    (eq? (linear_search (arr_new 0) 5) -1))

  (test found_middle
    (eq? (linear_search (make_array 1 2 3 4 5) 3) 2))

  (test not_found_zero
    (eq? (linear_search (make_array 1 2 3 4 5) 0) -1))

  (test not_found_large
    (eq? (linear_search (make_array 1 2 3 4 5) 10) -1))

  (test found_end
    (eq? (linear_search (make_array 1 2 3 4 5) 5) 4))

  (test found_start
    (eq? (linear_search (make_array 1 2 3 4 5) 1) 0))

  (test repeated_element
    (eq? (linear_search (make_array 1 2 3 2 5) 2) 1))
)
